workshop_title: Agile Foundations: Scrum and Kanban in Practice
venue: Large meeting room with whiteboards and breakout tables

pre_event_setup.task: Print Agile Manifesto reference cards and Scrum/Kanban summary sheets
pre_event_setup.notes: Ensure enough copies for 18 participants plus spares.

pre_event_setup.task: Procure physical materials: sticky notes (multiple colors), markers, and whiteboard erasers
pre_event_setup.notes: Verify markers are fresh and not dried out.

pre_event_setup.task: Draft and review facilitator discussion prompts for modules 01 and 02
pre_event_setup.notes: Focus on bridging engineering and marketing perspectives.

pre_event_setup.task: Prepare retrospective format templates for module 06
pre_event_setup.notes: Include at least 3 different formats (e.g., Start/Stop/Continue, Sailboat, 4Ls).

venue_readiness.task: Confirm room layout allows for 18 people in breakout groups
venue_readiness.notes: Ensure tables are arranged to facilitate collaborative whiteboard access.
Ensure sufficient writing surface for 18 participants.

attendee_communications.task: Send optional pre-reading materials (Agile Manifesto/Scrum/Kanban summary)
attendee_communications.notes: Include a note that this is optional to help level-set for the session.

attendee_communications.task: Send workshop reminder with location and start time
attendee_communications.notes: Reiterate that no laptops are needed.

action_items: Instructor delivers: Agile Foundations: Mindset and Principles

day_of_runsheet.module: Scrum Deep Dive: Roles and Ceremonies
action_items: Instructor delivers: Scrum Deep Dive: Roles and Ceremonies
Instructor delivers: Kanban Board Design Workshop
